title: PlanetOverlay
description: Editorial overlay per planet per locale. One file at data/i18n/[locale]/planets/[id].json where id is the lowercase planet name. Merged with base record from planets.json at fetch time (ADR-017). Surfaced by the /explore panel.

name.description: Display name (matches base entry but available in user's locale).

fact.description: One-paragraph editorial summary shown in the OVERVIEW tab.

bio.description: Editorial paragraph contextualising the orbit/axial-tilt/rotation data shown in the TECHNICAL tab.

missionable.description: When true, the panel surfaces the "PLAN A MISSION" CTA.
